summary: PRODUCTION VERIFICATION COMPLETE - Story Video Pipeline UI E2E, refresh recovery, platform audit, video download all verified working. Full E2E flow: Login → Story Video Studio → Generate → Processing → Done → Download works correctly.

issues: Cookie banner can overlay content on first load - needs 'Accept All' click

Processing phase: Progress bar, stage indicators, filmstrip thumbnails all update correctly
Done phase: Video player, download button, timing breakdown, create another - all working
Auto-resume on page load working - detects active jobs from user-jobs endpoint
Credits correctly deducted at job creation (50 for small story)
Video URLs accessible on Cloudflare R2 with proper content-type (video/mp4)
seed_data_creation: Created 1 new pipeline job: 'UI E2E Test Story'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full production verification complete. Pipeline UI E2E tested end-to-end. All platform pages load correctly (login, dashboard, story video studio). Video downloads verified accessible.

refresh_recovery.auto_resume: User can navigate away and return, active job state restored
